name: Jerry Seinfeld
bio: Jerry Seinfeld is an American stand-up comedian known for clean, meticulously crafted observational comedy about the minutiae of everyday life. He co-created and starred in the NBC sitcom Seinfeld (1989-1998), one of the most acclaimed sitcoms of all time, and later created the web series Comedians in Cars Getting Coffee. He is widely regarded as one of the most influential observational comedians of his generation.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up at New York clubs including Catch a Rising Star
First appearance on The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson
Co-creates Seinfeld with Larry David for NBC
Seinfeld series finale; returns to full-time stand-up touring
Launches web series Comedians in Cars Getting Coffee
Releases Netflix stand-up special Jerry Before Seinfeld

accolades: Golden Globe Award for Best Actor in a Television Series Musical or Comedy (1994)
Three Webby Awards for Comedians in Cars Getting Coffee
Clio Award and multiple Emmy nominations for Seinfeld

specials.t: Im Telling You for the Last Time
